flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pratt Institute-Main fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (51.5% → 38.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pratt Institute-Main rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($29.9k → $34.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pratt Institute-Main rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.6k → $61.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pratt Institute-Main fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
